metadata.description: End-to-end Radius Network development playbook. Stablecoin-native EVM with sub-second finality for extremely demanding applications.

plugins.name: radius-dev
plugins.description: End-to-end Radius Network development playbook. Stablecoin-native EVM with sub-second finality for extremely demanding applications. Covers TypeScript integration (plain viem), wallet integration (wagmi), smart contracts (Foundry), micropayments, x402 protocol integration, production gotchas, and EVM divergence from Ethereum.
